system.flavor: Divine energy infuses you, allowing hammer-like blows that would fell a demon with even your bare hands.
system.effect:
Effect 1
Attack: 2 damage. On hit: +1d3
Excel target of your attack explodes with divine energy with a burst 1 (target) area effect. All foes in the area take 2 damage, and allies in the area gain 2 vigor.
Critical Hit burst area by half the round number, rounded up.
